error.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.badRequest: The request could not be understood. Please check your input and try again.
error.unauthorized: Your credentials are incorrect or your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
error.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.conflict: This information is already in use. Please try a different value.
error.unprocessable: Some fields contain invalid values. Please review and correct them.
error.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
error.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again shortly.
error.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
error.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection.
error.emailExists: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
error.accountNotFound: No account found with those details.
error.accountLocked: Your account has been temporarily locked. Please try again later.

errorBoundary.title: System Crash Prevented
errorBoundary.description: Eventra encountered an unexpected crash. The issue has been intercepted and logged. You can try reloading, resetting your local cache, or copying the diagnostic report below to report this issue.
